items.claim: Dustin Jacoby has a significant experience advantage in this matchup.
items.quote: experience on the Jacoby side really it's it's tough to pick against him with that.

items.claim: Sam Patterson has poor tall man defense, often leaving his chin up to be hit.
items.quote: he does have that tall man defense. And if Sam Patterson loses this fight that's probably why. Because he does just kind of have his chin up there to be hit.

items.claim: Sam Patterson has a big grappling advantage if he gets the fight to the mat.
items.quote: he's a good grappler. And if he gets this fight to the mat, I I he has a big big time advantage over a guy like Ponzinibbio.

items.claim: Sam Patterson has good cardio despite being a bigger fighter for the division.
items.quote: He's also got pretty good cardio. You don't usually think of a guy that is kind of like bigger for the division to have good cardio.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzinibbio has never quite looked the same since suffering a major injury a few years ago.
items.quote: ever since Ponzi had that big injury like few years ago... he never quite came back the same.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzinibbio is the more technical striker in this matchup.
items.quote: For Ponzinibbio, solid striker. He's definitely the more technical striker.

items.claim: Mike Davis is the better striker in this matchup with good foot pressure and combinations.
items.quote: He's definitely the better striker in this match up. He's a good striker with good foot pressure, really good combinations.

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev is undefeated with an 11-0 record.
items.quote: Aliev is undefeated, 11 and 0, 5 and 0 in the last five.

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev's striking success is largely set up by his grappling threat.
items.quote: For Aliev, decent striker. It's basically the grappling threat sets it up and it sets up his flurries.

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev has very strong top pressure and smothering grappling once on the mat.
items.quote: Once he gets on top, his pressure is pretty darn good and he smothers you.
